name: add_api_rate_limiting
brief_template:
To add API rate limiting:
1. Choose strategy: token bucket, sliding window, or fixed window
2. Use library: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, or custom middleware
3. Store counters in Redis for distributed apps
4. Return 429 with Retry-After header
5. Skip rate limiting for health checks and internal IPs
6. Add different tiers: anonymous vs authenticated users
